title: Our first Dev Success Q&A was a success!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
We just finished our first Developer Success Q&A open zoom and it was a GREAT!

15 developers got into a room (virtually in this case) and talked about questions they had, issues and recommendations.

On our side, we answered everything there was to answer and got a good amount of extremely insightful feedback that will of course be shared with our colleagues so that we can review it and improve!

Thank you so much for participating

We can’t wait for the next one (Tuesday 15th, March, 17:00 GMT+2 by the way).

You can book your spot here!

See you there

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you everyone who joined
